prerequisites: An active When I Work account with valid user credentials (the email and password used to sign in).
Admin-level access to the When I Work account, which is required to obtain API access.

A private developer key (W-Key) issued by When I Work after your API access request is approved. Request access by emailing When I Work with your company name, admin/developer contact details, and intended use.
The user whose email and password you supply must have the permissions needed to read the data you intend to extract.

authMethods.name: Email and password (token login)
authMethods.summary: When I Work uses a token-based model. You authenticate by sending your account email and password (this connector's `email` and `password` fields) together with your private developer key (W-Key) to the login endpoint, which returns a bearer token used to authorize subsequent API requests. The connector collects the email and password; the developer key is obtained separately from When I Work as a prerequisite.

setupSteps.title: Request API access and obtain a developer key
setupSteps.body: Using an admin-level When I Work account, request API access from When I Work (for example by emailing them your company name, admin and developer contact details, and intended use). Once approved, you receive a private developer key (W-Key) used to log in and obtain tokens. This step is required by When I Work and is separate from the connector configuration.

setupSteps.title: Identify the user credentials to authenticate as
setupSteps.body: Choose the When I Work user whose context the connector should run as, and confirm that user can sign in with their email and password and has access to the data you want to extract.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials
setupSteps.body: Set the required `email` and `password` config fields to the When I Work user's sign-in email and password. Both fields are required and are stored as secrets. The connector uses these credentials to log in and obtain the bearer token used for API requests.

sources.title: Getting Access to the When I Work API - When I Work Help Center
